name: runpod-serverless
description: Ship any FastAPI + GPU inference service to RunPod Serverless as a production-grade LOAD_BALANCER endpoint. Covers image-based immutable releases, HF FlashBoot model caching, integrity gating against answer-injection, propose-review-judge agent runtime, red-team canary scoring, scaler-cascade drain, the canonical 2026-05-01 invariants (QUEUE_DELAY/4, idleTimeout=60, workersMin=0, workersMax>=3, james47kjv/* HF repo policy), and the 37 pitfalls learned from LAMP1 (canonical guide: C:/Users/innas/runpod_serverless_setup_guide_v2.md).
